nodes.name: auth.py
nodes.summary: Handles user authentication and JWT token issuance

nodes.name: login
nodes.summary: Validates credentials and returns a JWT

nodes.name: refresh_token
nodes.summary: Reissues a JWT given a valid refresh token

nodes.name: TokenStore
nodes.summary: In-memory cache for issued JWT tokens and revocation list

nodes.name: token.py
nodes.summary: Token storage and revocation service

nodes.name: revoke
nodes.summary: Marks a token as revoked

nodes.name: status.py
nodes.summary: Read-only device health status endpoint

nodes.name: get_status
nodes.summary: Returns current device state, firmware version, and uptime

nodes.name: device.py
nodes.summary: Device polling and state machine

nodes.name: DevicePoller
nodes.summary: Polls device over serial; handles timeouts and reconnect

nodes.name: poll
nodes.summary: Executes a single poll cycle with configurable timeout

nodes.name: models.py
nodes.summary: Shared Pydantic models used across API and services

nodes.name: DeviceStatus
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for device state, firmware version, and uptime

nodes.name: TokenClaims
nodes.summary: Pydantic model for JWT payload claims

nodes.name: db.py
nodes.summary: Database session factory and connection pool

nodes.name: get_session
nodes.summary: Returns a scoped SQLAlchemy session

nodes.name: config.py
nodes.summary: Application configuration loaded from environment variables

nodes.name: Settings
nodes.summary: Pydantic settings class; holds DB URL, JWT secret, poll timeout

nodes.name: test_auth.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for auth.py: login success, invalid credentials, token refresh

nodes.name: test_status.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for status endpoint: normal state, unavailable device

nodes.name: test_device.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for DevicePoller: poll success, timeout, reconnect

nodes.name: test_token.py
nodes.summary: Unit tests for TokenStore: issue, revoke, expiry

nodes.name: main.py
nodes.summary: FastAPI application factory; mounts routers and configures middleware

nodes.name: create_app
nodes.summary: Constructs the FastAPI app instance with auth and status routers
